title: MCRanked
description: Adds a ranked system to Minecraft. Tracks player wins, losses, and rank points. Matches players with similar ranks. Displays leaderboards and rank progress.
body: Minecraft Ranked adds a competitive ranking system to Minecraft. Players are matched based on skill, track wins and losses, earn rank points, and climb leaderboards. Includes configurable settings and works with multiple worlds. Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.11.
